## Communication Preferences

- Tends to go quiet when she disagrees — check in directly rather than assume alignment

## Pending Feedback

> Undelivered observations with coaching-tone talking points. Cleared when delivered.

- [2026-01-08] **Coasting risk** — surface carefully. Ask about what's energizing her right now. Don't frame as "you need more stretch work" — that lands as pressure. Better: ask what she'd want to do if she could choose her next project. Connect to the Helix research spike as one option.
